title: Cannot use ByteArrayInputStream as arguments in prepared statements anymore
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS my_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, my_column BLOB NOT NULL, my_text_column TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO my_table (my_column, my_text_column) VALUES (NULL, 'Sample Text');
INSERT INTO my_table (my_column) VALUES (CAST('Boundary Test' AS BLOB));
SELECT id, my_column, my_text_column FROM my_table WHERE my_column IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: setObject method no longer accepts ByteArrayInputStream
